title: LCCCK 9.5" Tall Teal Blue Glass Vase Beautiful Hand Blown Glass Decor Flowers Vases for Centerpieces, Modern Murano Glassde Art Teal Vase, for Home Decor Table Entryway Wedding Decoration
features: Exquisite Murano Style: This hand blown glass vase captures the essence of the Murano tradition with a modern twist. Its generous dimensions of 5.5 inches in width and 9.45 inches in height make it an art deco vase that's as functional as it is beautiful, perfect for displaying flowers or standing alone as a statement piece in any entryway or living room.

Versatile Centerpiece Elegance: Whether gracing a wedding table or anchoring a dining room centerpiece, the wide mouth of this vase at 2.4 inches allows for an array of floral arrangements, from delicate blooms to dramatic bouquets, making it ideal for creating stunning table vase centerpieces.

Modern Glass Artistry: The sleek, contemporary design of this modern glass vase blends seamlessly with any home decor style, from the minimalist to the ornate, and its clear, sea glass-inspired texture adds a touch of sophistication to any table or entryway decoration.

Luxury Crystal Accent: With the look and feel of a crystal vase, this piece offers an affordable luxury that elevates any space. It's not just a vase; it's a work of art, making it one of the jarrones grandes para sala elegantes that would be treasured in any setting.

Cherished Gift for Any Occasion: Present this blown glass decor as a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, anniversaries, birthdays, or as a memorable token for the host. Its timeless elegance and superior craftsmanship make it a gift that will be cherished and displayed with pride.
